prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: Deep beneath the shimmering waves, where sunlight danced in golden ribbons and coral castles bloomed in every color of the rainbow, lived a little octopus named Ollie. Ollie had eight wiggly arms, eyes as big and soft as moonstones, and a heart full of wishes—but he was terribly, ticklishly shy. Every time he saw the cheerful clownfish playing tag or the chatty seahorses sharing secrets, he’d tuck himself behind a swaying kelp frond, hoping someone might notice him… but never quite brave enough to say hello.
